emails.subject: Re: More on FERC generator hearings
emails.body: Re: More on FERC generator hearings Hey Jeff How goes it in Calif.? Things are quiet on the pipeline side. I'm supposed to make a trip out to Portland in the fall--Now that I work with the Portland General folks. Maybe I can swing by on my way to NAPA? Hope all is well and thanks for the update. Joe

emails.subject: Re: More on FERC generator hearings
emails.body: Re: More on FERC generator hearings Hey Jeff How goes it in Calif.? Things are quiet on the pipeline side. I'm supposed to make a trip out to Portland in the fall--Now that I work with the Portland General folks. Maybe I can swing by on my way to NAPA? Hope all is well and thanks for the update. Joe

emails.subject: Re: More on FERC generator hearings
emails.body: Re: More on FERC generator hearings It's a hell hole, whaddya think? Be great if you stopped by. Just let me know when you're going to be here. Love to have dinner and catch up. You involved at all with the gas infrastructure stuff that's going on at the Cal PUC. If not, I think that you should be. Now that Fawcett has left TW and Susan Scott's in our shop in Houston with Christie, I'm a little concerned about TW (I don't have as much time to monitor anymore). Be great if you got involved. Hope all is well with you and yours. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: More on FERC generator hearings
emails.body: Re: More on FERC generator hearings Jeff Thanks for the heads up. I'll see what's cooking internally and see if we can get some help. Two summers down one to go. Joe

emails.subject: Re: More on FERC generator hearings
emails.body: Appreciate it. Take care. Best, Jeff Joe Hartsoe 07/10/2001 06:42 AM
